blog_title: Screen Print Cracking in Monsoon — Why 300 T-Shirts Failed and the ₹15 Humidity Fix Every Printer Misses
caption:
Your 240 GSM oversize order ships in 3 days. Then it's gone for 2-3 weeks. 😬

Why? Machine speed drops 50% on heavier fabric. Oversize cuts eat 30-40% more yarn per piece. So while we pump 1000 pieces of 180 GSM daily, 240 GSM hits only 400-500.

Demand? 3x faster. Supply? 3x slower.

If you need it, plan 2-3 weeks ahead. Otherwise, stock dies.

Save this if you're sourcing your next bulk order 👇
